name: What are the biggest risks of lawyers using AI for case research?
description: Sanctions, suits, discipline; always verify AI output.[1][2]

mainEntity.name: What are the biggest risks of lawyers using AI for case research?

acceptedAnswer.text: Sanctions, suits, discipline; always verify AI output.[1][2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Sanctions, malpractice suits, bar discipline for fake citations or privilege waiver. NY courts sanctioned Levidow for ChatGPT fakes and ruled AI outputs non-privileged in Heppner.[1][2][3] Key factors: no verification, third-party disclosure. Train staff, use human review. Risks rising with AI scrutiny.
